name: Brass Jewelry Tray - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Keep your precious jewelry secured with this Brass Jewelry Tray from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This circular tray is designed in a brass finish and features a ribbed design that adds a textured look to your dressing table. Made of metal, this tray features two compartments and boasts a velvet lining to securely hold your earrings, rings, pendants, and other small pieces of jewelry.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
